announcement.title: 🎉 New year, same backlog
announcement.body: 48 hours of 2x rewards. Use them before the planning offsite reorganizes your team. Look-back bundle on the Shop tab — celebrate making it through another fiscal year.

shop.title: Resolutions Bundle
shop.description: Start the year with 1500 💎 gems, 150 ✦ shards, 7 🎫 access cards. One-time per account.
